$comment: SRC-FIXTURES — recorded trend-adapter poll responses for the zero-key fake trend adapter (release-spec §8.8 trend pathway; §3.3 scraping/trend provider BYO per RD-9; §6.7 trend report; §12 injectable seams; RD-12 'CI holds no secrets — the external call MUST be dependency-injectable so tests run zero-key with a fake'). This is the trend-pathway counterpart of fixtures/library-acme/expected/vision-responses.json. A fake poll(query) function (tests/helpers/fake-trend-adapter.js) returns the canned TrendReport array recorded here instead of hitting any real trend/scraping provider — so the WHOLE source→seed path runs with zero keys and zero network. Responses are keyed by a normalized query key {platform}:{window}. Each response is an array of objects shaped like schemas/inputs/trend-report.schema.json (Zone U, angles-only). The reports are duplicated inline here (rather than $ref'd) so the recording is self-contained for replay; the same reports also live as standalone files under ../reports/ for the manual-submission path. ALL SYNTHETIC — Acme Cosmos only. See ../PROVENANCE.md.
